mapper.insert: insert into batch.file_channel_config ( tenant_id, channel_code, channel_name, channel_type, target_endpoint, auth_type, config_json, receipt_policy, timeout_seconds, enabled, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{tenantId}, #{channelCode}, #{channelName}, #{channelType}, #{targetEndpoint}, #{authType}, #{configJson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{receiptPolicy}, #{timeoutSeconds}, #{enabled}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, current_timestamp, current_timestamp ) on conflict (tenant_id, channel_code) do update set channel_name = excluded.channel_name, channel_type = excluded.channel_type, target_endpoint = excluded.target_endpoint, auth_type = excluded.auth_type, config_json = excluded.config_json, receipt_policy = excluded.receipt_policy, timeout_seconds = excluded.timeout_seconds, enabled = excluded.enabled, updated_by = excluded.updated_by, updated_at = current_timestamp
